## What's New

### Fixed — Settings GUI lag

Slider **+** / **−** buttons and enable/disable toggles in the settings window now respond instantly.

**Root cause:** every slider click triggered a full redraw of all control states (up to ~60 WoW frame API calls per click), even when nothing about the enabled/locked state had changed.

**What was fixed:**

- `SetCombatMarkerControlsEnabled` and `SetAssistedHighlightControlsEnabled` now cache a 3-bit state signature `(enabled, locked, color-enabled)` and return immediately when unchanged — eliminating the redundant API call storm on every value change.
- `syncSliderControl` now guards `SetValue` behind a value-equality check, preventing cascade `OnValueChanged` re-triggers when the slider value hasn't actually changed.
- `RefreshCombatMarkerControls` routes all slider updates through `syncSliderControl` so the guard applies consistently.
